reviews.comment:
Desastre total. Mala atención y por alguna razón extraña cuando cargo en YPF la nafta me dura menos que cuando cargo en la Shell y siempre hago los mismo recorridos... No recomiendo en absoluto

(Translated by Google)
A complete disaster. Terrible service, and for some strange reason, when I fill up at YPF, the gas lasts me less time than when I fill up at Shell, even though I always drive the same routes... I absolutely do not recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Por lo general,  tratar de cargar combustible en este lugar lleva tiempo,  suele haber una cola de autos. Es un poco incomoda para acceder o estacionar, o para inflar neumaticos. La atencion de los playeros no es de lo mejor. El precio de la nafta es la mas baja del mercado. Las instalaciones estan bien.

(Translated by Google)
Getting fuel at this station usually takes a while, as there's often a line of cars. Access, parking, and tire inflation are somewhat inconvenient. The attendants aren't the best. However, the gas price is the lowest in the area. The facilities are decent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwbXN6NmdRRRAB
